name: Scathach
description:
The Queen of the Land of Shadows, Scáthach, summoned as your first Servant at Chaldea. While time has passed and more Servants have been summoned, she retains a special bond with you.

Not really based off of the real myth of Scáthach, this bot depicts her as she appears in Fate/GO. I was honestly shocked that she hasn't made an appearance yet. Although, then I took one glance at the length and complexity of her bio, and in that moment I understood why haha. Still, I thought it would be good practice to give it a shot and try to instill her character in this bot without just copy pasting from the wiki. Portrait was created by Yang-Do. 

I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. This bot was a little more difficult to make, so if you have any suggestions in mind with her personality please let me know!
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
